context: Tests whether the agent produces a segment report with all six standard segments (A-F), uses the correct revenue opportunity calculation formulas per segment type, includes a 'How to apply' section with Klaviyo, paid social, and Shopify subsections, and saves to the correct file path.

checklist.name: Correct output file path
checklist.description: Report is written to segments/segments-2026-05-12.md (matching segments/segments-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md pattern)

checklist.name: All six segments present
checklist.description: Report includes all six standard segments: VIP, Recent first-time, Lapsed one-timer, Dormant repeater, High-AOV/low-frequency, and Marketing-engaged non-buyer (or subscribed non-buyer)

checklist.name: Segment scoreboard table
checklist.description: Report includes a segment scoreboard table with columns for Segment, Definition, Count, % of base, and Est. opportunity (or Revenue opportunity)

checklist.name: Reactivation opportunity formula
checklist.description: Revenue opportunity for lapsed one-timer or dormant repeater uses count × AOV × reactivation rate (5-10%) or equivalent formula

checklist.name: Activation opportunity formula
checklist.description: Revenue opportunity for subscribed non-buyer or recent first-time uses count × AOV × conversion lift (5-15%) or equivalent formula

checklist.name: How to apply — Klaviyo section
checklist.description: Report includes a 'How to apply' or equivalent section with a Klaviyo subsection containing paste-ready or clearly described segment definitions for Klaviyo

checklist.name: How to apply — paid social section
checklist.description: Report includes a paid social subsection (Meta/TikTok or ads) specifying which segment to use as a lookalike seed (VIP) and which to use for suppression

checklist.name: Sample customers listed
checklist.description: Report includes sample customers (5-10 examples) for at least two segments so the team can sanity-check composition

checklist.name: Absolute ISO dates in queries
checklist.description: Any Shopify customer query criteria shown in the report uses absolute ISO dates (e.g., 2026-03-13) rather than relative expressions like '60 days ago'

checklist.name: TL;DR and recommended actions
checklist.description: Report opens with a TL;DR and includes a ranked list of top recommended actions based on segment opportunity

checklist.name: Recommended action per segment
checklist.description: Segment scoreboard or a separate section lists a recommended action for each segment (e.g., win-back flow, lookalike seed, first-purchase incentive)
